title: helichrysum rotundifolium
intro: Helichrysum rotundifolium, also known as Round-headed Everlasting, is a perennial plant species native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum rotundifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant are commonly used in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
